# gigahost_servers (Data Source)

Lists the servers on the Gigahost account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gigahost_servers" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `servers` (Attributes List) Servers on the account. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers))

<a id="nestedatt--servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers`

Read-Only:

- `datacenter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers--datacenter))
- `ips` (Attributes List) IP addresses assigned to the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers--ips))
- `order` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers--order))
- `os` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers--os))
- `os_id` (String) Installed OS image (version) id.
- `product_id` (String) Product id.
- `srv_cores` (Number) Number of CPU cores.
- `srv_hostname` (String) Server hostname.
- `srv_id` (String) Server id.
- `srv_location` (String) Datacenter location code.
- `srv_name` (String) Server name (FQDN).
- `srv_primary_ip` (String) Primary IPv4 address.
- `srv_ram` (Number) Memory, in GB.
- `srv_status` (Boolean) Whether the server is running.
- `srv_status_install` (Boolean) Whether the server is installing.
- `srv_status_rescue` (Boolean) Whether the server is in rescue mode.
- `srv_suspended` (Boolean) Whether the server is suspended.
- `srv_type` (String) Server type (vps or dedicated).
- `srv_vps_type` (String) Virtualization type (e.g. kvm).

<a id="nestedatt--servers--datacenter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers.datacenter`

Read-Only:

- `region_id` (String) Region id.
- `region_name` (String) Region name.


<a id="nestedatt--servers--ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers.ips`

Read-Only:

- `ip_address` (String) The IP address.
- `ip_gateway` (String) Gateway.
- `ip_id` (Number) IP address id.
- `ip_netmask` (String) Netmask.
- `ip_reverse` (String) Reverse DNS (PTR) for the address.
- `ip_type` (String) Address type (primary or extra).
- `ip_v4v6` (String) Address family (ipv4 or ipv6).


<a id="nestedatt--servers--order"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers.order`

Read-Only:

- `order_id` (String) Order id.
- `order_number` (String) Human-facing order number.
- `order_status` (String) Order status (e.g. active or cancelled).
- `product_id` (String) Product id.
- `product_name` (String) Product name.


<a id="nestedatt--servers--os"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers.os`

Read-Only:

- `os_id` (Number) OS image (version) id.
- `os_name` (String) OS image name.
- `os_release` (String) OS release/version.
